account.save-and-bind: Save as account & bind this workspace
account.credential-invalid: This workspace's bound account credential may be invalid — update it in Settings › Accounts.

terminal.rebuild-tooltip: Rebuild (resume) ⌘⇧B — kill and re-spawn via --resume at the current size to clear ghosting/overlap that can't be repainted. Interrupts the in-progress turn and reprints the conversation.
terminal.drag-to-tab-tooltip: Drag onto a tab above to move this pane to another tab
terminal.commander-tooltip: Global Manager — coordinates across stages, decides ---STAGE-DONE---
terminal.idle-status-tooltip: Process still alive, but agent has finished the last turn and is at an interactive prompt

cli-missing.title: CLI not installed
cli-missing.message: {label} exited with "command not found" — the CLI is not installed. Install it now? The install command runs in an external terminal; respawn the pane once it finishes.

action.rebuild-tab-cli-panes: Rebuild every resumable CLI pane in the active tab. This interrupts in-progress turns and reprints each conversation.
action.add-editor-selection: Add editor selection as context (Cursor-style: adds selected code as {'@'}selection chip)
action.attach-file: Attach file — add any workspace file as context (Cursor-style)
action.attach-image: Attach image — pick an image file from disk to add to context
action.enhance-prompt: Enhance prompt — AI rewrites your message to be clearer and more specific
action.fix-typescript-errors: Fix TypeScript errors — run type check and pre-fill a fix request
action.undo-last-send: Undo last send — remove last message and restore text to input
action.workspace-notes-active: Workspace notes (active — injected into every message)
action.close-settings-run: Close settings and go to run
action.add-as-context: Add response as context for next message
action.pin-file-path: Pin a file path to always include
action.clear-pipeline: Clear pipeline state and close all agent panes
action.discard-progress: Discard all stage progress and re-run from Stage 01

management.title: Settings Management
management.bundle-hint: Exports Roles, Pipelines, MCP, Analyzer, non-sensitive AI Chat settings, and appearance preferences. API keys and tokens are redacted and are not overwritten on import.

appearance.theme-hint: Theme is a user-level preference applied across all workspaces.
appearance.language-hint: Language is a user-level preference applied across all workspaces.
appearance.restore-windows-hint: Reopen the workspace windows you had open when you last quit.
appearance.tweaks-hint: Tweaks are layered on top of the current theme and preserved when switching themes.
appearance.environment-hint: Re-run the first-launch environment detection wizard (checks Homebrew / Node / CLI / Ollama, etc.).
appearance.backend-timeout-hint: How long to wait for the backend to become healthy on startup or restart before giving up. Raise this on slower machines (15–120 seconds).

roles.title: Roles
roles.reset-confirm-body: All custom roles will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

accounts.title: Git Accounts
accounts.encrypted-note: Tokens are encrypted at rest with your OS keychain (safeStorage) and stored locally on this machine.
accounts.unavailable: Encryption is unavailable on this system, so accounts cannot be added. This usually means the OS keychain is not accessible.
accounts.label: Label
accounts.token-hint: Paste a Personal Access Token. It is encrypted with safeStorage and stored locally — never in plain text.
accounts.token-keep: Leave blank to keep the current token

analyzer.llama-cli-path-hint: (leave blank to use the default from PATH)
analyzer.gguf-path-hint: (when set, this file is used directly, bypassing Ollama)
analyzer.model-placeholder: Model name, e.g. qwen2.5-coder, llama3.2, gemma3
analyzer.no-local-models: No local models detected. Run ollama pull <model-name> or use the download field above.
analyzer.benchmark-hint: Runs 4 standard tasks against all local models to determine which ones are suitable for pipeline intent detection:
analyzer.task-t3: Relevance selection — picks the most relevant item from a doc list
analyzer.task-t4: CLI intent parsing — parses agent output and extracts questions and options
analyzer.pass-threshold: Pass threshold: at least 3 of 4 tasks (≥75%). Models that fail will be hidden from the Model dropdown.
analyzer.cloud-keys-hint: API keys are stored locally with restricted file permissions (0600). Leave blank for providers you don't use.

label.no-items: No items to display in this directory
label.list-truncated: List truncated — not all items are shown
label.select-workspace: Select a workspace to get started
label.no-parallel-slots: No parallel slots — stage runs with a single agent.
label.history-session-unavailable: Session memory is no longer available
label.no-roles-available: No roles available. Open the manager to add one.
label.no-role-selected: No role selected. The agent will start without role injection.
label.pipeline-aborted: Pipeline aborted. Agents are kept — Resume to continue, or Reset to clear.
label.pipeline-aborted-paused: Pipeline aborted (paused). Agents are kept — Resume to continue, or Reset to clear.
label.pipeline-completed: ✓ Pipeline completed all 4 stages. Review each pane on the right.
label.provide-task: Provide task description + workspace, then start.
label.tagline: Drive Claude Code · Codex · Antigravity CLI together
label.no-recent-workspaces: No recent workspaces yet. Click Browse… to open a project folder.
label.restart-preserved: Existing pipeline.log is preserved (events keep appending). project.json's stage records will be reset to pending.
label.two-ways-title: Two ways to drive the team
label.two-ways-pipeline: — drive all {count} SDLC stages end-to-end. Each stage spawns the recommended CLI + role and receives a tailored kickoff prompt.
label.two-ways-grid: — spawn one agent at any role/stage you want, ad-hoc.
label.set-workspace-pipeline: Set workspace + (for pipeline) task description on the left first.
label.connect-remote-title: Or connect to an existing remote repository
label.connect-remote-hint: Merge the current directory with a remote repo (no separate folder selection needed)
label.nested-repos-hint: Open one to manage it in the Git panel
label.no-symbols-found: No symbols found in open files
label.no-symbols-detected: No symbols detected in the current file
label.new-file-hint: New File — enter path relative to workspace
label.file-create-hint: Press Enter to create · Esc to cancel
label.stage-description-hint: Brief description of what this stage does
label.task-placeholder: Describe the task to drive through all stages. e.g. "Build an internal approval system for the store, digitising the paper workflow…"
label.inline-edit-placeholder: Instruction or question — e.g. 'add error handling' or 'how does this work?'
label.save-conflict: File changed on disk since it was loaded.
label.title: Title
label.question: Question
label.label: Label

error.not-git-repo-desc: This folder does not have a .git directory

hint.restart-confirm: This will discard the current project state ({completed}/{total} stages recorded as completed) and re-run from the beginning using the same task description.
hint.select-role-or-create: Select a role on the left or click + New role.
hint.default-role-fallback: `defaultRole` will fall back to whatever happens to match at runtime
hint.replace-all-roles: Replace all — delete current roles NOT in the import file
hint.select-stage-or-create: Select a stage on the left or click + Add Stage.
hint.delete-stage-warning: This removes the stage from the persisted registry...
hint.reset-stages-warning: All custom stages will be removed...
hint.completion-modal-body: Every agent has delivered its results — check the panels on the right.
hint.git-credential-token: Paste a Personal Access Token in the password field — not your login password.
hint.download-model: Download any one; any installed model...
hint.replace-all-truncated: Results are truncated — narrow the search before replacing all
hint.select-role-create: Select a role or click + New role
hint.connection-failed: Connection failed — check that the command is correct
hint.reset-roles-title: Reset all roles to factory defaults?
hint.reset-stages-title: Reset all stages to factory defaults?
hint.at-least-one-pipeline: At least one pipeline must remain
hint.ready-check: Once all required items are ready, you can enter the main screen.
hint.not-ready: Some required items are not yet ready

preview.cannot-display-text: This file type cannot be displayed as text.
preview.pdf-unavailable: The embedded PDF viewer is not available in this window.

restore.dialog-message: The app didn't close properly last time. Reopen {count} workspace(s)?

cli-health.title: Navide found an agent CLI setup issue
cli-health.detect-title: See exactly what Navide will run
cli-health.detect-desc: Multiple installations or a failed startup probe can make Terminal and Navide launch different binaries. Review the active path before changing anything.
cli-health.repair-desc: Keep one known-good installation. Remove alternates with the package manager that installed them, then run the CLI's own diagnostic.
cli-health.verify-desc: After finishing in Terminal, run detection again. This guide closes automatically when the issue is gone.
cli-health.keep-primary: Keep the active binary shown by Navide if it is the version you expect.
cli-health.remove-alternate: Remove alternate installations using their original package manager; do not disable macOS security.
cli-health.run-doctor: Run the CLI diagnostic, then return here and re-detect.
cli-health.use-version-note: This is safe and reversible: it changes only the executable Navide launches. It does not uninstall anything or weaken macOS security.
cli-health.removal-opened: A confirmation prompt for removing {label} was opened in Terminal. Return here and re-detect when it finishes.
cli-health.still-detected: The issue is still detected. Check the paths above and try again.

head.permissions: Set up Navide on your computer

aside.environment: Navide drives real CLIs in real terminals — these tools are what it runs on.
aside.agents: Every pane you open runs one of these agents. One is enough to start.
aside.permissions: Grant the access Navide needs to drive your machine.
aside.ready: Everything checks out. Open the app and pick a workspace.

onboard.notif-test-body: Notifications are on — you'll hear from your agents here.

automation.title: Allow Navide to run install commands in Terminal
automation.desc: Some CLIs must be installed in a real terminal. This lets Navide open Terminal and type the command for you.
automation.why: macOS calls this Automation. Navide only ever sends the install command you clicked — it never reads what is in your terminal windows.
automation.denied: Terminal control was denied. Turn it on in System Settings, then re-detect.
automation.pane-hint: Enable Terminal under Navide in Privacy & Security → Automation.

notifications.title: Allow Navide to notify you
notifications.desc: Get told when an agent finishes, asks a question, or a long task ends — without watching the pane.
notifications.why: Notifications are only sent for your own agents' state changes. Nothing is sent anywhere else.
notifications.denied: Notifications are turned off. Enable them in System Settings, then re-detect.
notifications.pane-hint: Allow notifications for Navide in Notifications.

folders.title: Allow Navide to open your project folders
folders.desc: Workspaces on your Desktop, in Documents or Downloads are protected by macOS. Grant access so they can be opened.
folders.why: macOS asks once per folder. Navide only reads the workspace you pick — no other folder is touched.
folders.denied: Folder access was denied. Enable it in System Settings, then re-detect.
folders.pane-hint: Enable Navide in Privacy & Security → Files and Folders.

fullDisk.title: Allow Navide full disk access
fullDisk.desc: Only needed for workspaces outside your home folder. Optional — you can turn it on later, in System Settings.
fullDisk.why: macOS gives no in-app way to ask for this: it can only be toggled in System Settings. Navide re-checks automatically once you flip it.
fullDisk.denied: Full disk access is off. Toggle Navide on in System Settings — this screen updates by itself.
fullDisk.pane-hint: Toggle Navide on in Privacy & Security → Full Disk Access.
